task_completion.description: The DICOM metadata window is opened to view the tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A DICOM viewer application is open, and a window or panel displaying DICOM metadata (tags, attributes, and values) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the DICOM metadata window is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool, terminal command, or file manager shows the screenshot being saved specifically to ~/DICOM/exports/dicom_info_screen.png.

task_completion.description: The routing_info.txt file is created or opened for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal shows the file ~/DICOM/exports/routing_info.txt being edited or created.

task_completion.description: The Patient ID is correctly extracted and formatted in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the line 'PatientID: 556342B' or 'PatientID: 322-292-73-6'.

task_completion.description: The Study Instance UID is correctly extracted and formatted in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the line 'StudyUID: [Value]', where the value exactly matches the Study Instance UID (Tag 0020,000D) visible in the DICOM metadata window.

task_completion.description: The Series Instance UID is correctly extracted and formatted in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the line 'SeriesUID: [Value]', where the value exactly matches the Series Instance UID (Tag 0020,000E) visible in the DICOM metadata window.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical DICOM viewer to access the metadata.
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata is viewed within a graphical DICOM viewer application, rather than being extracted purely via command-line tools like strings or dcmdump.

integrity.description: The extracted UIDs match the actual DICOM metadata.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UIDs typed into the text file correspond exactly to the ones displayed in the DICOM metadata window, without any hallucinated or fabricated characters.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot captures the actual DICOM metadata window.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot saved to dicom_info_screen.png captures the actual DICOM metadata window, not just the terminal or an empty desktop.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The text file must be saved at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/routing_info.txt and the screenshot at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/dicom_info_screen.png. The PatientID should be either '556342B' (for CT scan) or '322-292-73-6' (for MR scan). The StudyUID and SeriesUID must match the values shown in the DICOM metadata window.
